name: Shark AI Ultra 2-in-1
description: Shark AI Ultra delivers solid cleaning with a self-emptying base at a price that undercuts premium competitors by half.
longDescription: Shark AI Ultra 2-in-1 is our best budget self-emptying robot vacuum. After extensive testing, we found it delivers excellent performance and features that justify its position in our rankings.
pros: Great value at $499 with self-empty base
verdict: Shark AI Ultra 2-in-1 is a solid choice for budget self-emptying robot vacuum. Great value at $499 with self-empty base. No mopping capability.

faqs.question: Who is the Shark AI Ultra 2-in-1 best for?
faqs.answer: Shark AI Ultra delivers solid cleaning with a self-emptying base at a price that undercuts premium competitors by half.

faqs.question: Is the Shark AI Ultra 2-in-1 worth the price?
faqs.answer: The Shark AI Ultra 2-in-1 offers decent value, but no mopping capability. Consider whether these trade-offs are acceptable before purchasing.
